response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the performance of 'FASHIONBEAT'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics; manual transcription and translation were performed for the announcement segment and visual text throughout the video. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal triggers and visual text durations, with aggressive truncation applied during rapid speech in the announcement segment to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: みなさーん！
subtitles.english: Everyone!

subtitles.original: 4月28日から開催でーす！
subtitles.english: It starts from April 28th!

subtitles.original: さくらみこ POP UP SHOP 京都IP書店 オープン記念
subtitles.english: [Title: Sakura Miko POP UP SHOP at Kyoto IP Shoten - Opening Commemoration]

subtitles.original: オリジナルグッズの発売や、
subtitles.english: Original goods will be on sale, and...

subtitles.original: ノベルティのコラボも行われるので、
subtitles.english: there will also be a novelty collab,

subtitles.original: みなさん楽しみにしてくださーい！
subtitles.english: so everyone, please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 盛りだくさんだー！
subtitles.english: It's packed with stuff!

subtitles.original: そして、まだございまーす！
subtitles.english: And there's more!

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: Next is this!

subtitles.original: さくらみこ×HYTE コラボPCケース 発売決定！
subtitles.english: [Visual: Sakura Miko x HYTE Collab PC Case Release Confirmed!]

subtitles.original: さくらみこ×HYTE、コラボPCケース、発売決定！
subtitles.english: Sakura Miko x HYTE, collab PC case, release confirmed!

subtitles.original: キーキャップとデスクマットのセットもございます。
subtitles.english: There's also a set with keycaps and a desk mat.

subtitles.original: 先行予約リリースや、詳細については、
subtitles.english: For pre-order release and details,

subtitles.original: hyte.co/miko を見てみてください。
subtitles.english: please check out hyte.co/miko.

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててね！
subtitles.english: Look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして、今年も！
subtitles.english: And this year too!

subtitles.original: 鳴門鯛焼本舗×さくらみこ コラボ
subtitles.english: [Visual: Naruto Taiyaki Hompo x Sakura Miko Collab]

subtitles.original: さくらみこ×鳴門鯛焼本舗さんのコラボが実施中でーす！
subtitles.english: The Sakura Miko x Naruto Taiyaki Hompo collab is underway!

subtitles.original: 今年でなんと、4回目です！ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: It's the 4th time this year! Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 3月31日までなので、みんなぜひ食べに行ってください！
subtitles.english: It's until March 31st, so everyone, please go and eat some!

subtitles.original: 続いて、
subtitles.english: Next,

subtitles.original: 新曲 FASHIONBEAT 本日24時よりリリース！
subtitles.english: [Visual: New Song 'FASHIONBEAT' Released Today at 24:00]

subtitles.original: 新曲、FASHIONBEAT、本日0時よりリリースでーす！
subtitles.english: the new song, FASHIONBEAT, is released from 0:00 today!

subtitles.original: MVはこの後プレミア公開！みんな見てね！
subtitles.english: The MV premiere is after this! Everyone, watch it!

subtitles.original: とっても豪華なアニメMVとなっております。よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: It's a very luxurious anime MV. Please check it out.

subtitles.original: はい、そして、こちら！
subtitles.english: Yes, and this!

subtitles.original: hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 & hololive 7th fes.
subtitles.english: [Visual: hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 & hololive 7th fes.]

subtitles.original: 明日から、ホロライブエキスポとセブンスフェス開催でーす！
subtitles.english: From tomorrow, Hololive Expo and 7th Fes are being held!

subtitles.original: 3日間の開催ですよー！すごーい！
subtitles.english: It's a 3-day event! Amazing!

subtitles.original: みこはですね、セブンスフェスではDay 2のステージ2に参加します。
subtitles.english: As for Miko, I'll be participating in Stage 2 of Day 2 for the 7th Fes.

subtitles.original: みんな見に来てね！
subtitles.english: Everyone, come and see me!

subtitles.original: その後は、メンバー限定の撮影会もあるので、
subtitles.english: After that, there's also a member-only photo session,

subtitles.original: みんなみこぴーになってね！
subtitles.english: so everyone, become a Mikopi!

subtitles.original: ということで、告知がもりもりもりだくさんになりましたが、
subtitles.english: So, the announcements became super, super packed,

subtitles.original: みんなついてこれたかな？
subtitles.english: but did everyone manage to keep up?

subtitles.original: みこ、これからも頑張るので、よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Miko will keep doing her best from now on, so please support me.

subtitles.original: 誕生日祝ってくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for celebrating my birthday!

subtitles.original: おつみこー！
subtitles.english: Otsumiko!

subtitles.original: 出演：さくらみこ、戌神ころね、百鬼あやめ...
subtitles.english: [Credits: Cast - Sakura Miko, Inugami Korone, Nakiri Ayame...]

subtitles.original: 痛くて 目を塞いでも
subtitles.english: Even if it hurts and I close my eyes,

subtitles.original: 聞こえちゃう 不安ショー
subtitles.english: I can still hear it, the anxiety show.

subtitles.original: 悩んでも変わらないから
subtitles.english: Since worrying won't change anything,

subtitles.original: なんだかんだやるしかないか
subtitles.english: I guess I have to just do it, after all.

subtitles.original: 壊れるならいっそ直しやすいように
subtitles.english: If I'm going to break, I'd rather break in a way that's easy to fix.

subtitles.original: どんな形目指せるかな
subtitles.english: What kind of shape can I aim for?

subtitles.original: 助走なしのジャンプ
subtitles.english: A jump without a run-up,

subtitles.original: 紐無しでダイブ
subtitles.english: A dive without a safety line,

subtitles.original: 今日のあたし 褒めてあげたいじゃんか
subtitles.english: I really want to praise myself for today, don't I?

subtitles.original: 息したい もっと響きたい
subtitles.english: I want to breathe, I want to resonate more,

subtitles.original: ねえあたし以上が見れるかも
subtitles.english: Hey, maybe I can see something beyond myself.

subtitles.original: 妄想止まんないや
subtitles.english: My imagination won't stop.

subtitles.original: ファッションビート 嗅いでみちゃう？
subtitles.english: Want to try sniffing out a fashion beat?

subtitles.original: 夢にあっそなんて吐けやしないな
subtitles.english: I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams.

subtitles.original: 叶えるのはあたし自身か
subtitles.english: Is it me myself who will fulfill them?

subtitles.original: それとも誰かにお任せか
subtitles.english: Or should I leave it to someone else?

subtitles.original: ただ ただ自分に勝ちたい
subtitles.english: I just, just want to win against myself.

subtitles.original: ニューファッションビート 愛を喰らう
subtitles.english: New fashion beat, devouring love,

subtitles.original: 負けるなんてごめんだ 味がしないな
subtitles.english: I won't accept losing, it has no taste.

subtitles.original: 何度でも灰になる進化
subtitles.english: Evolution that turns to ash, again and again,

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: Personification of a reborn bug.

subtitles.original: まだ まだ腐ってあげない
subtitles.english: I'm not, I'm not going to rot away yet,

subtitles.original: そう、ない
subtitles.english: No, not at all.

subtitles.original: チクチク刺してくるのは
subtitles.english: What keeps pricking at me,

subtitles.original: 飽き飽きしてるわ
subtitles.english: I'm already sick of it.

subtitles.original: ごめん 鬱雑い 言葉遊びは
subtitles.english: Sorry, all those annoying word games,

subtitles.original: どうか ちゃんと 仕舞っておいて
subtitles.english: Please, just put them away properly.

subtitles.original: 私こそがライバル 当たり前の解釈
subtitles.english: I am my own rival, that's an obvious interpretation,

subtitles.original: どうしたらいい わかってるのに
subtitles.english: Even though I know what I should do.

subtitles.original: 助走なしのジャンプ
subtitles.english: A jump without a run-up,

subtitles.original: 紐なしでダイブ
subtitles.english: A dive without a safety line,

subtitles.original: 今日のあたし できる気しないなって
subtitles.english: 'I don't feel like I can do it today,'

subtitles.original: 気にしない なんて無理じゃない？
subtitles.english: Isn't it impossible to say I don't care?

subtitles.original: ねえあたし以外と比べても
subtitles.english: Hey, even if I compare myself to others,

subtitles.original: クソつまんないじゃんか
subtitles.english: Isn't it just boring as hell?

subtitles.original: ファッションビート 嗅いでみちゃう？
subtitles.english: Want to try sniffing out a fashion beat?

subtitles.original: 夢にあっそなんて吐けやしないな
subtitles.english: I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams.

subtitles.original: 叶えるのはあたし自身か
subtitles.english: Is it me myself who will fulfill them?

subtitles.original: それとも誰かにお任せか
subtitles.english: Or should I leave it to someone else?

subtitles.original: ただ ただ自分に勝ちたい
subtitles.english: I just, just want to win against myself.

subtitles.original: ニューファッションビート 愛を喰らう
subtitles.english: New fashion beat, devouring love,

subtitles.original: 負けるなんてごめんだ 味がしないな
subtitles.english: I won't accept losing, it has no taste.

subtitles.original: 何度でも灰になる進化
subtitles.english: Evolution that turns to ash, again and again,

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: Personification of a reborn bug.

subtitles.original: まだ まだ腐ってあげない
subtitles.english: I'm not, I'm not going to rot away yet,

subtitles.original: そう、ない
subtitles.english: No, not at all.

subtitles.original: 止まれない
subtitles.english: I can't stop,

subtitles.original: 誰かじゃない あたし自身だ
subtitles.english: It's not anyone else, it's me myself.

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: Personification of a reborn bug,

subtitles.original: まだ まだ散ってあげない
subtitles.english: I'm not, I'm not going to scatter yet,

subtitles.original: そう、ない
subtitles.english: No, not at all.

subtitles.original: 生誕LIVE 2026 今年も祝ってくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: [Visual: Birthday LIVE 2026 - Thank you for celebrating with me again this year!]

subtitles.original: みんなのおかげでたくさんのことを乗り越えてみこでいられてるよ。
subtitles.english: [Visual: Thanks to everyone, I've overcome many things and am able to be Miko.]

subtitles.original: まだまだ笑っていよう!!
subtitles.english: [Visual: Let's keep smiling!!]

subtitles.original: そしてこれからもキミとあきらめない心でアイドルがんばる!!
subtitles.english: [Visual: And from now on, I'll do my best as an idol with you and an unyielding heart!!]
[Visual: - Sakura Miko, 2026.3.5]
